entries.label: Business Line of Credit
entries.summary: Potential revolving-access path for businesses with stronger revenue, credit, and operating history.
watchOutFor: Actual options depend on review, documentation, lender criteria, business performance, and credit profile.

entries.label: Equipment / Truck / Asset-Backed Funding
entries.summary: Potential path for revenue-producing equipment, vehicles, trucks, repairs, or asset-backed needs.
watchOutFor: Actual options depend on review, documentation, lender criteria, business performance, and credit profile.
entries.typicalSpeedNote: Depends on asset, quote, and lender review

entries.label: Ecommerce / Marketplace Seller Capital
entries.summary: Potential path for ecommerce or marketplace sellers with sales history and platform data.
watchOutFor: Actual options depend on review, documentation, lender criteria, business performance, and credit profile.
entries.typicalSpeedNote: Platform data may speed up review

entries.label: Real Estate / Asset-Secured Capital
entries.summary: Potential path for property-backed or project-specific capital.
watchOutFor: Actual options depend on review, documentation, lender criteria, business performance, and credit profile.

entries.label: Startup / Credit-Leverage Funding
entries.summary: Potential path for newer operators where personal credit, income, and clean setup may matter more than business history.
watchOutFor: Actual options depend on review, documentation, lender criteria, business performance, and credit profile.
entries.typicalSpeedNote: Depends heavily on credit and documentation

entries.label: Fast Working Capital
entries.summary: Potential path for operators with recurring business deposits and short-term cash-flow needs.
watchOutFor: Actual options depend on review, documentation, lender criteria, business performance, and credit profile.
entries.typicalSpeedNote: Fast review possible when documents are ready

entries.label: Business Credit Builder / Funding Prep
entries.summary: Prep path for owners who need better setup, documents, banking posture, or credit readiness before a deeper funding review.
bestFor: Owners with red flags or incomplete setup
watchOutFor: This is an educational and readiness path, not a funding offer.
entries.typicalSpeedNote: Prep timeline depends on the gaps found.

entries.label: Manual Funding Strategy Review
entries.summary: Human review path when the answers need context before suggesting a funding direction.
watchOutFor: A review is not an approval, offer, or commitment to lend.
entries.typicalSpeedNote: Review timing depends on document readiness and complexity.
